_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Only perfect mCDK4 transcript sequence matches are shown; there are none in the non-immortalized parental culture, as expected
details: mCdk4 transgene expression confirmed via WGS and transcript mapping in immortalized cell lines, with no perfect mCDK4 transcript sequence matches in non-immortalized parental culture
